name: COMO Golf Club
address: 801 N College Ave Building A, Columbia, MO 65201
about: COMO Golf Club is an indoor golf and multisport simulator lounge in Columbia, Missouri. It utilizes tour-level technology in a comfortable, climate-controlled space with a relaxed, social atmosphere. The venue features golf and multisport experiences with beverage service and a selection of shareable food options. Booking is strongly recommended, especially for evenings and weekends.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level Uneekor Eye XO2 launch monitors for accurate ball and club tracking
Climate-controlled, indoor space with a relaxed social vibe and beverage service
Multisport capabilities beyond golf, offering varied activities and games

food_and_drink.notes: Selection of simple shareable food options available for purchase.
Beer, wine, and other beverages available for purchase. Outside alcohol is not permitted.

simulator_hardware.notes: Ceiling-mounted sports camera with auto-calibration for instant action tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks (including alcohol) are not allowed in the facility, with the exception of prior arrangements for private events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Most groups book 1-2 hours. Larger groups or full 18-hole rounds may require more time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly. They can accommodate kids' parties and have a young boy using a soccer ball in their multisport simulator in promotional imagery.
